defaults.ticker: GPT-5.6 UPDATE  ·  GATED PREVIEW NOW OPENING  ·  CHATGPT, CODEX & API ROLLING OUT  ·  PARTNERS FIRST

rundown.headline: GPT-5.6 Rollout Widens
bullets: The gated preview is starting to open up
A developing follow-up to last week's restrictions

beats.text: Good evening, and welcome back. We have a developing update on the GPT-5.6 story.
The rollout that was held to a handful of partners is now beginning to widen.

rundown.headline: What Changed
rundown.ticker: ACCESS EXPANDS  ·  STAGED ROLLOUT BEGINS  ·  SAFETY REVIEW CLEARED
bullets: Staged access now reaching more developers
ChatGPT and Codex onboarding has begun

beats.text: Since our last report, the controlled deployment has cleared its first review, and access is expanding in stages.
Onboarding for ChatGPT and Codex users has quietly begun, with the A-P-I close behind.

rundown.headline: The Lineup, Now Available
rundown.ticker: GPT-5.6 LINEUP  ·  SOL  ·  TERRA  ·  LUNA  ·  WIDER ACCESS
bullets: Sol — the flagship, now to more teams
Luna — faster and lower-cost, broadly rolling out

beats.text: All three models, Sol, Terra, and Luna, are reaching a wider set of teams this week.
Early users echo OpenAI's claim that Sol leads on coding while spending fewer output tokens.

rundown.headline: OpenAI's Position
rundown.ticker: OPENAI STATEMENT  ·  “A SHORT-TERM STEP, AS WE SAID”  ·  FRAMEWORKS NOW IN PLACE
bullets: Calls the faster opening proof of its “short-term step”
Says access process should keep getting lighter

beats.text: OpenAI says the quicker opening is exactly the short-term step it described, not a permanent gate.
With new security frameworks in place, the company says the access process should keep getting lighter.

rundown.headline: What's Next
rundown.ticker: ROLLOUT  ·  GENERAL ACCESS TARGETED IN WEEKS  ·  WE'LL KEEP FOLLOWING
bullets: General availability now targeted within weeks
Watch for pricing and rate-limit details next

beats.text: OpenAI is now targeting general availability within weeks, rather than months.
We'll be watching for pricing and rate limits as the doors open wider. That's our update. Thanks for watching.
